title: Supply Chain Manager - Nimbus Post - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Nimbus Post - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!
